LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA, ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OF THE COURTS AND SUSAN HOUGH MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION:NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ADJUDICATION AS TO DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER FAILURE TO PROMOTE WAS BASED UPON DISCRIMINATION. AS TO DISABILITY HARRASSMENT - GRANT. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT RE SEVERE AND PERVASIVE CONDUCT. AS TO FAILURE TO ACCOMMODATE - GRANT. AS TO RETALIATION - GRANT. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/JJM/PB) COURT REPORTER SUSAN K. CROZIER, CSR #4761

AS TO FAILURE TO ACCOMMODATE - GRANT.
